global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with prominent text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with a discount offer.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Binge starts now' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'Cancel anytime' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A bold, eye-catching '-30%' badge in white, indicating a discount, is placed prominently.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Book now' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'FluxStream' appears at the top left, featuring a modern font style.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in the center, adding visual interest without being distracting.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape that complements the design, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape that adds a playful touch to the overall design.

elements.label: Additional rectangle
elements.description: A rectangular shape that serves as a background for the text elements.

elements.label: Small decorative circle
elements.description: A small circle positioned towards the bottom, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Bottom background area
elements.description: A larger area at the bottom of the ad that contains the main text and CTA.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now Cancel anytime 30% Book now

elements.label: Brand name text
elements.description: The text 'FluxStream' is displayed in a modern font, representing the brand.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: The text 'UGC' indicates user-generated content, adding credibility to the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and vibrant, Binge starts now, Book now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, a discount badge, and a CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Cancel anytime, 30%, Book now, FluxStream, UGC
